description: A shared e-scooter has not moved in 72 hours, indicating it may be lost, stolen, or broken. An operator must investigate.

nodes.task_description: Receive an alert for an e-scooter that has been stationary for more than 72 hours.
Retrieve the scooter's last known GPS location and battery level.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets the location and sees the battery is dead.

nodes.task_description: Dispatch a field technician to retrieve the abandoned scooter.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a task for the micromobility provider's field team.
